prompt:
router is exact-match only and the gateway team is stuck. Need pattern routing:

- ":name" segments capture one path segment ("/repos/:owner/:repo")
- "*name" as the FINAL segment captures the whole non-empty remainder including slashes; "*" anywhere else, or unnamed "*"/":", is a registration error via a sentinel ErrInvalidPattern
- new Match(path) returning (handler, Params, ok) where Params is the captures map
- precedence when several patterns fit, decided per segment left to right: static beats :param beats *wildcard (so /api/users/:id wins over /api/:section/stats for /api/users/stats)

Handle/Lookup/List keep their exact current semantics — Lookup stays a literal string lookup, no pattern smarts. params_test.go is the acceptance contract, router_test.go pins today's behavior, hands off both test files. Green = go test -race -timeout 30s ./...
